name: Bettermoo(d) Food Corp.
description: Bettermoo(d) Food Corporation is an innovative plant-based dairy alternative food and beverage company based in Vancouver, British Columbia, Canada. The company focuses on developing and delivering high-quality, sustainable plant-based products that aim to rival the flavor profiles of traditional dairy. With an established award-winning vegan cheese division located in Europe and a growing portfolio of dairy-alternative beverages, bettermoo(d) is dedicated to cultivating a community that embodies a balanced, health-conscious, and environmentally friendly plant-based lifestyle through its online and in-store retail platforms.
